title: Street Fighter 6/Version/1.05 - SuperCombo Wiki
content_text: Version 1.05 Game Version 1.05 date May 22, 2024 Summary Akuma Release. Balance changes for all characters. Links Patch Notes Akuma Patch Akuma released Universal Changes Damage Scaling on grounded light normals increased 10% → 20% Back Throw oki has generally been weakened when throwing opponent into the corner Drive Reversal on block -8 → -6 and can no longer be low-profiled Can now be input on wakeup by holding 6HPHK; this version is 2f faster (18f) and has no screen freeze Drive Parry: Throw hurtbox expanded; strike/projectile hurtbox expanded from frame 3~ Minimum parry time increased by 8f total (extra 4f active + 4f recovery) After a successful parry, Drive gauge starts to regenerate after 20f instead of 60f Perfect Parry now inflicts scaling to meter gain and Drive damage for the entire punish combo 20% scaling on Super gauge build for both characters 50% scaling on defender's Drive damage and on attacker's Drive gain Can no longer override the damage scaling of a Drive Impact Stun performed at the max distance from corner (bug fix) 1st startup frame of SA1 is now strike/throw invuln instead of full invuln for all characters that have invincibility Key Character Changes A.K.I. 5LK startup 5f → 4f, recovery 11 → 12, Hit Advantage +4 → +3, Block Advantage -2 → -3 5MK startup 9f → 8f, less pushback on hit 2MP whiff recovery reduced by 3f (now the same as on hit/block) 2MK Hit Advantage +4 → +5, Block Advantage -3 → +1 Now a much stronger combo/pressure tool out of Drive Rush 5HP Block Advantage -5 → -4 and Target Combo hitconfirm window 19f → 20f 5HK reduced hurtbox and better anti-air invincibility while active 2HK active frames 5 → 6, recover 21 → 20, reduced horizontal hurtbox, and more consistent juggle state out of Punish Counter Hun Dun (5LP~LP) Hit Advantage 0 → +1 (extra hitstun allows a 5MP link when DR canceled) LP Serpent Lash (236LP) more range, less pushback on Toxic Blossom hit, and crumples on Punish Counter Allows a much stronger midscreen juggle on a Toxic Blossom Punish Counter crumple HP Serpent Lash (236HP) head hurtbox reduced on frame 4 (was frame 6) Nightshade Pulse (214LP) can now be canceled into 236KK until the end of recovery OD Nightshade Chaser (214PP~6P) now causes a knockdown on hit (was -4 vs. grounded opponent) Toxic Wreath (214HP) damage distribution changed: 400,400 → 200,600 (improves juggles where only 2nd hit connects) 2nd hit active frames 7 → 9 (can now be up to +4 on block) 214K can now be canceled to SA3 after landing; HK version has more pushback (safer on block, worse Burnout pressure) OD Cruel Fate (214KK) can also be canceled on the non-cinematic version Venomous Fang (2PP~P) projectile invincibility extended until end of active frames Heel Strike (2PP~K) hitbox expanded and works more consistently in combos Entrapment (2PP~LPLK) removed 20% immediate scaling LK Snake Step (236LK) now moves backwards instead of returning to original position SA1 hitbox expanded SA2 damage on final attack 800 → 1000 Blanka 2LP Hit Advantage +4 → +5 5MP reduced hurtbox while active 2MP extends a hurtbox on whiff until end of recovery 2MK whiff/block recovery 16 → 18; 2f extra blockstun (same Block Advantage, but affects all cancel data); extends a hurtbox on whiff until end of recovery Rock Crusher (6MP) Block Advantage -2 → -3 (weaker block mixup after Drive Rush) Wild Lift (2PP~P) hitbox expanded forward MP Rolling Attack ([4]6MP) hitbox expanded during combos (combos more consistently from canceled light normals) OD Rolling Attack ([4]6PP) landing recovery on block shifted 4f earlier (1f land → 5f land), making Perfect Parry punishes more consistent Also applies to all SA2 enhanced Rolling Attacks OD Backstep Rolling Attack (63214KK) 1st attack hitbox expanded forward OD Aerial Rolling Attack (j.[4]6PP) landing recovery 10 → 15, can now be minus on block on close range connect Blanka-chan Bomb (22P) starter scaling 20% added; also counts as 2 hits when comboed into (scaling only applies once per combo) Cammy Forward Throw: slightly more pushback on hit (still allows throw loops) 5MP reduced pushback 5HK on block -4 → -3 and reduced pushback Swing Combination (5HP~HK) 2f easier to hitconfirm; 2nd hit of HK now cancelable Damage distribution on HK changed 200,600 → 400,400 Damage scaling changed from Combo (5% Extra) → Combo (2 hits), and both hits of HK apply separate damage scaling Quick Spin Knuckle (214MP/HP/PP) projectile invuln now starts later, 6f → 9f (meterless) / 3f → 9f (OD) Significantly harder to use on reaction to projectiles HP Hooligan Combination (236HP) collision box changed; can no longer juggle Divekick after escaping corner with 4MP~HK > 236HP OD Fatal Leg Twister (236PP~LPLK) starter scaling 20% → 30% Juggle directly into SA3 is often stronger than an extended combo after the throw Cannon Strike (j.214K) hurtbox changed Early frames are more vulnerable to projectiles, later frames are less vulnerable to low attacks SA2 cinematic damage increased 2800 → 3000; input changed from 214214K → 214214P Chun-Li Back Walk Speed reduced 0.037 → 0.035 5LP lower-body hurtbox expanded on frames 9-13 2MK extends a hurtbox on whiff until end of recovery 5HP Block Advantage -4 → -3 with more pushback; reduced hurtbox on arm and around head/feet 5HK starter scaling 20% added (weaker when used as anti-air juggle starter) Swift Thrust (4/6MP) hitconfirm window 17f → 15f, Drive Rush cancel occurs 2f earlier (allowing combo to 4HP) OD Kikoken ([4]6PP) starter scaling 20% added Hazanshu (214K) projectile invuln shifted 1f later on all versions (6f → 7f) Aerial Hundred Lightning Kicks (j.236K) hurtbox expanded downward, landing recovery on whiff increased 15 → 18 OD Aerial Hundred Lightning Kicks (j.236KK) damage 1300 → 1600, landing recovery reduced 15 → 5, KD advantage increased by 7f Air SA1 final hit damage 600 → (j.2LK) reduced vertical hitbox; now in a Punish Counter state until landing (more risky vs. specific anti-air normals) Threebeat Combo (5LP~MK~MK) Hit Advantage +2 → +3 OD Air Slasher ([4]6PP) starter scaling 20% added; more juggle potential on 2nd hit Jackknife Maximum ([2]8MK/HK/KK) airborne 1f later (4f → 5f); reduced forward hitbox vs. grounded opponents (weaker as a punish) Double Rolling Sobat (236HK) improved juggle limit OD Double Rolling Sobat (236KK) improved juggle limit and less likely to whiff under opponent Funky Slicer (214K~LK) starter scaling 20% added; 3f extra recovery on whiff or vs. armor; more susceptible to low-crush attacks Maximum Strike (214K~HK) anti-air invuln now applies to body on frames 15-19 OD Maximum Strike (214KK~HK) now counts as 2 hits of scaling when comboed into SA1 damage 1800 → 2000, recovery 45 → 33, Block Advantage -24 → -12 with more pushback SA2 now scales Super Art meter gain by 30% for all hits until the combo ends Dhalsim Drive Reversal KD advantage +23 → +24, now knocks down on 1st hit 2MK reduced pushback on hit, causes different reeling animation on hit when +4 or better 5HK Hit Advantage +1 → +3, pushback reduced (more consistent Drive Rush cancel follow-ups) j.2LP increased juggle potential, now causes knockdown vs. airborne opponents Held Yoga Fire (236[P]) startup 45 → 43, recovery 32 → 30 (total animation Honda 2LK now cancelable into Sumo Spirit enhanced 214P (only combos into LP version) 5MP Hit Advantage +4 → +6 and more forward movement (now a much stronger option out of Drive Rush) 5MK foot hurtbox severely reduced (excellent vs. low pokes); now cancelable into Sumo Spirit enhanced 214P 2MK Hit Advantage +5 → +6 (gives more consistent confirms out of Drive Rush); now cancelable into Sumo Spirit enhanced 214P 5HP Punish Counter crumple KD advantage increased by 12f (KD +65 → +77) 2HK 2nd hit puts airborne opponents into higher juggle state, allowing for side-switch Drive Rush juggles j.MP now puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state Toko Shizume (5MP~3HK) kara-cancel occurs 1f earlier (reducing the gap when canceling into Oicho Throw) Can now be canceled into Sumo Spirit on hit by inputting 2HK; only useful when juggled into (unsafe on grounded hit) Enhanced MP/HP Hundred Hand Slap (ss.214MP/HP) leaves opponents closer on hit (grounded or airborne connect) LP/MP Sumo Headbutt ([4]6LP/MP) first hit damage 1300 → 1400; Block Advantage -4 → -3 Pushback on block reduced; extra pushback when opponent is in Burnout 4th active frame has an extended hurtbox that applies when opponent is in a combo (improving consistency from ranged cancels) HP Sumo Headbutt ([4]6HP) first hit damage 1400 → 1500; Block Advantage -4 → -3 Pushback on block reduced; no change to pushback when opponent is in Burnout Honda will now start landing recovery after 15 active frames when switching sides with opponent (no longer flies far under neutral jumps) Sumo Smash ([2]8K) downward hit is now a Hard Knockdown; pushback on block increased (no longer in range for 2LP frame trap or Oicho Throw) Drive Damage on block for downward hit increased 8000 → 10000 OD Sumo Smash ([2]8KK) downward hit is now a Hard Knockdown; Block Advantage +1 → +2 Can now hold MK to extend airborne time by 2f, or LK to extend by 4f (useful to disrupt Perfect Parry timing) OD Teppo Triple Slap 1 (236KK~P) now keeps opponents standing on grounded hit (+3) SA1 hitbox expanded downwards Guile 2MP 3f extra recovery on whiff (13 → 16), now extends hurtbox on whiff until end of recovery 5HP starter scaling 20% added j.MK damage 500 → 600 Reverse Spin Kick (6HK) knocks down on airborne Counter-hit (KD +30~34) Double Shot (2MP~2MP) juggles opponent closer to Guile Sonic Boom ([4]6P) arm hurtbox appears 2f before active; arm hurtbox expanded upward (easier to punish Sonic Boom with a ranged jump-in that reaches the top corner of Guile) Drive Damage on block now different for each version: LP 2500 (unchanged) / MP 4000 / HP 3000 OD Sonic Boom ([4]6PP) starter scaling 20% added OD Sonic Blade (214PP) KD advantage +53 → +57, opponent is juggled closer to Guile Sonic Cross (214P~6P) arm hurtbox appears 1f earlier (2f before active); arm hurtbox expanded upward just like Sonic Boom Drive Damage on block now different for each follow-up 6P strength: LP 1500+2000 / MP 3000+2000 / HP 2000+2000 OD Sonic Cross (214PP~6PP) Drive Gauge cost 4 → 3 (only 1 extra bar when performed with immediate 6PP input) Opponent's wallsplat lasts 3f longer SA1 (Straight) first 3 active frames changed so that most of the hitbox only hits an opponent mid-combo Only the very base of the hitbox hits normally; functionally 11f startup to reach its max range as a punish or anti-fireball tool Jamie Back Throw KD Advantage +38 → +26 Combined with universal distance nerf, prevents meterless strike/throw oki 5MP Block Advantage +1 → +2 5MK Hit Advantage +1 → +2 (also allows Punish Counter cancel to 214HP) 2MP Block Advantage 0 → -1;
